features.title: Initialize repository memory and stage-gate structure
features.context: Establish progressive-disclosure files before implementation begins.

features.title: Define autonomous spraying and fertigation requirements
features.context: Capture hardware, routing, safety, sensor, and dosing constraints before coding.

features.title: Define hardware BOM and Pixhawk/Raspberry Pi/pump/valve pinout
features.context: Create a non-firmware hardware integration reference for prototype purchasing, wiring, power isolation, and field-safe actuator control.

features.title: Select exact bench-test pump, nozzle, valve, and sensor ratings
features.context: Turn FEAT-003 generic hardware interfaces into concrete safe bench-test ratings for prototype procurement and validation.

features.title: Define water-only bench-test procedure and acceptance log
features.context: Create a deterministic, safe bench procedure for leak, pressure, e-stop, low-liquid, valve-zone, and nozzle catch-cup checks before chemical/fertilizer tests.

features.title: Configure ArduRover Pixhawk actuator mapping and export parameter file
features.context: Map AUX1-AUX5 (SERVO9-SERVO13, RELAY1-RELAY4) to pump PWM, spray valves, agitation, and E-stop cutoff; generate production-ready pixhawk-ardurover-sprayer.param.

features.title: Generate Mission Planner / QGC waypoint files (.plan and .waypoints)
features.context: Convert cucumber row spray routes into QGroundControl .plan and ArduPilot WPL 110 .waypoints files with embedded DO_SET_SERVO and DO_SET_RELAY spray triggers.

features.title: Implement ArduRover SITL preflight gate and dosing calibration script
features.context: Develop ArduRover SITL / companion control logic to enforce preflight sensor checks and speed-synchronized dosing before mission execution.

features.title: Implement SITL position confidence gate and canopy dead reckoning fallback
features.context: Cross-check RTK GPS, IMU, wheel odometer, and ultrasonic distance in SITL; trigger dead reckoning or safe HOLD on canopy GPS signal loss without logic crashes.

features.title: Validate SITL fault recovery, resume policy, and complete mission telemetry log
features.context: Prove SITL mission completion under simulated obstacles and sensor drops, verify safe resume without duplicate spraying, and log black-box telemetry.
